creator: des@des.no
text:
Florent Thoumie <flz@xbsd.org> writes:
> Are you ok to mark the port as BROKEN as submitter proposed it while
> you're trying (maybe) to fix it.

Only in the WITHOUT_X11 case.

It would help a lot if the originator could provide me with a working
configuration (disk image + .doscmdrc) to test with.

> I'm just unsure we need to keep this PR open since it's not really a
> ports-related problem and it's been there for quite a long time now.

The PR was submitted at a time when doscmd was part of the base
system.  While it no longer is in the base system, it is still
maintained in our CVS tree, and I see no reason to close the PR.

DES
--=20
Dag-Erling Sm=F8rgrav - des@des.no
